assertions.title: Index scaling benchmark measures at multiple scales

steps.action: Verify each row has file_count, build_time_s, index_size_bytes
steps.expected: All fields present with valid values

steps.action: Verify all timing values are positive floats

assertions.title: Index scaling benchmark records query performance

steps.expected: Valid JSON with rows containing queries
steps.observed: JSON parsed successfully, each row has queries array

steps.action: Check each row has queries array with >= 3 entries
steps.observed: 3 queries per row at all 3 scales

steps.action: Verify each query has pattern (string) and median_s (positive float)
steps.expected: Valid pattern strings and positive median_s values
steps.observed: All 9 query entries valid: patterns=['ERROR timeout', 'WARN retry budget', 'trace_id='], all median_s > 0

steps.expected: Each row has query_median_s as positive float

steps.action: Verify >= 3 distinct patterns across all scales

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed, 0 failed. Both VAL-BENCH-007 and VAL-BENCH-008 confirmed that bench_index_scaling.json contains rows for 3 scales (1k, 5k, 10k files) with valid build_time_s, index_size_bytes, and per-query median_s for 3 patterns at each scale.
